name: Heatmap
description: Renders a heatmap chart in the Rhino viewport and exports raw SVG body content. Chain svgCode into CRC_SaveSVG to write the file.

inputParameters.name: dataMatrix
inputParameters.description: 2D data matrix (DataTree one branch-per-row or nested list). Defaults to demo data if empty.

inputParameters.name: gradientColors
inputParameters.description: Color gradient (min 2 System.Drawing.Color). Defaults cool-to-warm if absent.

inputParameters.name: rowLabels
inputParameters.description: Row labels as strings (e.g. R1, R2)

inputParameters.name: colLabels
inputParameters.description: Column labels as strings (e.g. C1, C2)

inputParameters.name: showCellValues
inputParameters.description: Show numeric values inside cells (default False)

inputParameters.name: labelDist
inputParameters.description: Distance from axis labels to chart edge (default 10.0)

inputParameters.name: legendBarW
inputParameters.description: Legend bar width (default auto, ~5% canvas dim)

inputParameters.name: legendDist
inputParameters.description: Distance from chart area to legend (default 20.0)

inputParameters.name: legendLabelDist
inputParameters.description: Distance from legend bar to its labels (default 5.0)

inputParameters.name: legendOrientation
inputParameters.description: Legend orientation: vertical or horizontal (default vertical)

inputParameters.name: legendCellOutlineWidth
inputParameters.description: Legend cell border width in pixels (default 0.5)

outputParameters.name: svgCode
outputParameters.description: Raw SVG body content (no <svg> wrapper). Chain into CRC_SaveSVG for file export.

outputParameters.name: report
outputParameters.description: Verbose status — success details or error trace.
